notes: v0.12.4 — left nav rebuilt as GLASS PANEL (220px wide, semi-translucent vertical gradient, horizontal rows with icon left + label right). Active row gets cyan→magenta diagonal gradient + animated diagonal shine clipped to the row (no overflow) + cyan border + magenta→cyan vertical stripe + right caret. Section dividers now left-aligned label with thin rule. Content area shifted to start at x=260 to clear the wider rail. Profile bar starts at the same x. Windows only.
